changelog:
v2.0.5 (2026-03-31)

  • New: POST /cache/litespeed/preset — applies a LiteSpeed preset (default: essentials) using LiteSpeed's own PHP class (LiteSpeed\Preset::cls()) from within WP context. No SQL writes.
  • New: POST /cache/litespeed/purge — fires litespeed_purge_all and litespeed_api_purge_all action hooks from within WP context.

v2.0.4 (2026-03-26)

  • Previous release

v2.0.3 (2026-03-22)

  • Fix: Preflight archive_noindex now handles both 'on' and '1' values for disable_author_archives and disable_date_archives (Rank Math uses inconsistent formats)
